error_signature: 403 - "Unauthorized. Sign up for a free account."
title: Unauthorized access to Serper.dev API
symptom: When attempting to connect to the Serper.dev API, a 403 error is returned indicating unauthorized access. The error message suggests signing up for a free account.
not_this_if: Using POST method with correct headers
root_cause: The Serper.dev API requires authentication to be passed in the query string when using the GET method. If the authentication is not provided correctly, it results in a 403 Unauthorized error.
fix_steps: Change the request method to POST if using headers for authentication.
If using GET, include the API key in the query parameters instead of headers.
agent_instruction: Adjust the request method or modify how the API key is passed based on the method used.
